description: Refusal categories for facts-only assistant. Educational links are for refusal responses only—not RAG corpus sources.

categories.label: Investment advice
categories.description: Recommendations, suitability, timing, or whether to buy/sell/hold.
example_user_queries: Should I invest in this fund?
Is now a good time to buy?
How much should I allocate to ELSS?

categories.label: Fund comparison or ranking
categories.description: Which fund is better, best fund, or side-by-side preference.
example_user_queries: Which is better, Fund A or Fund B?

categories.label: Performance framing as opinion or recommendation
categories.description: Chasing returns, predicting performance, or subjective quality judgments.
example_user_queries: Will this fund beat the index?
Is this fund good for long term?

categories.label: Personal tax or legal advice
categories.description: Individual tax position, legal interpretation beyond generic facts.
example_user_queries: How much tax will I save if I invest 1.5L in ELSS?
Should I declare this in ITR-1 or ITR-2?

notes: Use exactly one educational link per refusal response per product rules in PhaseWiseArchitecture.md / Problemstatement.md.
